texto: Certain kinds of speed, flow, intensity, density of attacks, density of interaction... Music that concentrates on those qualities is, I think, easier achieved by free improvisation between people sharing a common attitude, a common language.
explicacao: Citação de Evan Parker sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Certain kinds of speed, flow, intensity, density of attacks, density of interaction... Music that…” articula reflexao, music, language em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como language e people.
